subcodes.first_line: O thou who art guided by the supreme guidance! Give thanks unto God that the Sun of Truth hath shed upon thee the light of guidance and illumined the horizons [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهتدی بهدایت کبری شکر کن خدا را که شمس حقیقت نور هدات مبذول داشت و آفاق
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @martyrs and martyrdom, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @knowledge; recognition of God
